channel.title: Stay Unfinished
channel.description: A simple loop to make small moves, get feedback, and keep improving—useful for products, teams, and everyday change.

item.title: When Design Systems Become Monuments
item.description: Why most design frameworks fail—and how to build systems that stay alive through continuous evolution and intelligent adaptation.

item.title: Chapter 3: Building Trust When the Ground Keeps Shifting
item.description: Why your roadmap doesn't match your promises—and what design leaders can do about it.

item.title: Learning Rituals That Help Teams Build Better Products
item.description: Three lightweight, enterprise-ready rituals that turn weekly signals into decisions—without slowing delivery.

item.title: The Five-Day Sprint That Keeps Research From Dying in a Folder
item.description: Why your customer interviews become invisible—and how to transform fresh insights into stakeholder decisions in five days.

item.title: Sample: The Room You Were Never In
item.description: Read a sample from Unfinished about why good work disappears in rooms nobody studied, and four questions that help work land.

item.title: Why I Chose to Write a Living Manuscript
item.description: Why static strategy fails in enterprise UX—and how a living manuscript turns fresh research into decisions teams can actually use.
